title: chrysanthemum setaceum
intro: Chrysanthemum setaceum, also known as the thread-leaved chrysanthemum, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum setaceum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum setaceum include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
